title: Uncraftable Coins
description: Currency coins that cannot be crafted - perfect for controlled server economies where operators manage the money supply.
body:
# Uncraftable Coins

**Uncraftable Coins** is a fork of [RPG Coins](https://modrinth.com/mod/coins) specifically designed for controlled server economies. This version removes all crafting recipes, making coins obtainable only through creative mode or commands.

## What Makes This Different?

Unlike the original RPG Coins mod, **Uncraftable Coins** has **no crafting recipes**. Players cannot:
- Craft coins from ingots
- Convert between coin types
- Farm resources to create currency

This makes the mod perfect for servers where operators need full control over the money supply.

## Features

- Adds **Gold Coin**, **Iron Coin**, and **Copper Coin** items
- **Zero crafting recipes** - coins can only be added by operators
- Works with economy plugins and shop mods as regular items
- Can be stored, traded, and dropped like any item

## Ideal For

- **RPG Servers** - Distribute coins as quest rewards
- **Economy Servers** - Admins control currency circulation
- **Survival Servers** - Non-farmable currency for player shops
- **Custom Gamemodes** - Any scenario requiring controlled currency

## Compatibility

- **Required:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- **Works with shop mods:** [Spud's Shops](https://modrinth.com/mod/spuds-shops), [Universal Shops](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-shops)
- **Compatible with:** [RPG Series mods](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)

## Installation

1. Drop the `UncraftableCoins.jar` into your `mods` folder (client and/or server)
2. Start Minecraft - the mod works immediately
3. Use creative mode or `/give` commands to distribute coins

## Tags

- `coins:coins`
- `coins:gold_coin`
- `coins:iron_coin`
- `coins:copper_coin`

## Coins

![The three coins added by the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26269f0a02adaf1dccc10cb6fa5aa7a928dbc1ae.webp)

## Credits

This mod is a fork of [RPG Coins](https://modrinth.com/mod/coins) by [Riser876](https://modrinth.com/user/Riser876).

Original design inspired by [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) by [ZsoltMolnarrr](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr).
